title: Elaeosticta korovinii
taxonomy: Elaeosticta korovinii is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to Central Asia and has been classified as belonging to the genus Elaeosticta. Elaeosticta korovinii is further classified as a member of the tribe Anthemideae and the order Apiales. The plant's classification is based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic relationships with other plants in the family Apiaceae. Elaeosticta korovinii's classification provides important information for its identification and conservation.
